# GlyphAffixAttributeRef.HasParam property

True when this entry carries a real GBID in [`ParamPlus12`](./ParamPlus12.md) (i.e. it is tag-conditional). False when the slot is the [`NoParam`](./NoParam.md) sentinel.

public bool HasParam { get; }
